title: 268. Säsongsavslutning och aktier för hängmattan
summary_md:
# 268. Säsongsavslutning och aktier för hängmattan

**Feed**: aktiepodden  
**Published**: 2026-06-26  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

Season finale of Aktiepodden focused on 'hammock stocks' for the rest of 2026, with each host pitching a low-maintenance long-term holding while reviewing colleagues' picks. The hosts are wary of an extremely narrow, momentum- and AI-driven market rally (epitomized by SpaceX's IPO at ~94x sales) and credit spreads widening, and they openly wish for a market correction/normalization. They favor proven quality compounders and serial acquirers, while flagging a few turnaround/catalyst plays like Tobii Dynavox into Q2.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 LAGR-B — Lagercrantz | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 70%

Top-quality serial acquirer with proven track record (~800% over 10 years), solid history and decent balance sheet; safe long-term hold.

#### Reasoning

Lars's 'hammock stock' — a buy-and-forget compounder. Serial acquirers dominate the best 10-year performers; Lagercrantz is among the most qualitative. He cautions multiple expansion and the zero-rate era boosted past returns, so expects above-index but not a repeat of ~800%, yet sees durable model and quality justifying ownership.

#### Sell Triggers

- if acquisition execution/returns deteriorate
- if valuation multiples compress sharply
- if higher rates make the M&A model structurally unprofitable

> *"lagerkransen har varit bland de bästa så då känner jag mig rätt trygg med att köpa ett bolag som har en solid historik som har en okej balansräkning"*

---

### 🟠 TDVOX — Tobii Dynavox | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 55%

Beaten-down on flows; weak Q1 blamed on weather with promise to recover in Q2; heavy short interest could fuel a rally on a strong Q2 print.

#### Reasoning

Oliver's contrarian pick framed as the watershed: a strong Q2 (recovering Q1's weather-driven miss) plus heavy short positioning could spark a sharp rally and make it a great long-term hold. A second weak quarter would force structural questioning, echoing how Ubico unraveled. High-risk catalyst trade around the Q2 report.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Q2 is weak
- if the Q1 weakness proves structural rather than weather-driven
- broader medtech outflows continue

> *"om vi ser att att Q2-fallet just blir en stark rapport då tror jag att man har mycket förlorat mark att ta igen på kurssidan"*

---

### 🟢 LIFCO — Lifco | **BUY** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 55%

High-quality serial acquirer, very popular stock with a strong net analyst recommendation profile.

#### Reasoning

Colleague Jakob's pick; hosts call it a 'feast company' and one of the most popular on the exchange with a good recommendation net. Fits the durable serial-acquirer thesis, but largely a consensus quality holding without a fresh catalyst.

#### Sell Triggers

- if acquisition pipeline/returns weaken
- if its premium valuation compresses

> *"Lifco är också ett kalasbolag"*

---

### 🟠 HEXA-B — Hexagon | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Post-restructuring (sold Design Engineering, spun off Octave, bought Waygate) it is leaner, more focused and more cyclical — re-rating potential if conditions improve.

#### Reasoning

Colleague Jan's pick; hosts agree the streamlining makes the company easier to understand and less sprawling, and the added cyclicality is appealing into a potential upturn. Simplification/refocus is seen as a good recipe for stock-market success.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the cyclical recovery fails to materialize
- if restructuring fails to improve clarity/valuation
- if integration of Waygate disappoints

> *"renodling känns som ett bra recept för framgång på börsen. Så det kan jag också köpa in mig i"*

---

### 🟡 AAK — AAK | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Excellent at margin extraction but essentially no top-line growth; awaits combining margins with volume growth as cocoa prices fall; buybacks/extra dividends.

#### Reasoning

Colleague Sebastian's pick, likened to Securitas — a pure profitability-improvement story with anemic growth. Falling cocoa prices could lift chocolate consumption and volumes, but Lars is now more cautious precisely because nothing happens on the top line; buybacks/extra dividends could be seen as either positive or slightly desperate.

#### Sell Triggers

- if volume growth fails to appear
- if margin gains plateau
- if cocoa-price tailwind reverses

> *"jag har gillat AK just för att de har duktig operativt men just det händer ingenting på översta raden så nu är jag lite försiktigare"*

---
